scores.correctness_notes: Core syntax and container-resource linking are correct. However, `description` is marked as required (✅) in the table when the gold standard lists it as optional. The commonly-used `upstream-source` field is not mentioned at all.
scores.hallucination_notes: No fabricated APIs or non-existent parameters. The CLI commands section (upload-resource, resources, resource-revisions, set-resource-architectures) are real charmcraft commands. Minor inaccuracy: description is presented as required when it is actually optional.
